untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern requires detection of higher highs/lower lows (widening phase) and subsequent narrowing range (reversal phase) with specific geometric properties. These complex multi-bar pattern recognition features cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and simple comparison operators. Would require pattern detection library or multi-bar lookback logic not supported in this schema.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core entry signal using volume characteristics (volume below 20-day average indicating diminishing volume during formation, followed by volume spike above 1.5x 20-day average for breakout). Exit uses price closing below SMA_20 as a reasonable trend reversal condition. However, the actual diamond bottom pattern detection (tracing of higher highs/lower lows, then narrowing range) cannot be properly codified without pattern recognition capabilities beyond this rule engine.
